productDisplayName: Nike Women As Script Mas Navy Blue Sweatshirts
description: Composition Navy blue hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a lined hood with drawcord, has a rib cuffs and hem for durability and snug Fit, and a kangaroo pocket with interior cord-management feature Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean With classic cursive print, this nike "Moto" Script Hoodie honours speed-obsessed motocross athletes in a warm, media-friendly design. The ribbed hem and cuffs offer a snug fit, while the interior cord management feature keeps media player cords away from your sporting experience.
